def negative_external_input_without_validation():
    rule_id = "external_input_without_validation"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Request or CLI entry points that trust external input without obvious validation or guard checks."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
